dialogos.texto_en: Uesugi-san... What on earth is happening here?
Just a moment ago we were at the park by the sea,\nand now we're walking through an unfamiliar village%p-2;――
ARE WE IN SOME ALTERNATE UNIVERSE?!
Enough with the jokes.
Wha-?!\nCan't you just play along for a bit?!
Itsuki, you take over.
Huhhh?!
Wh-what shall we dooo?\nI wonder what era we're innn?
...I didn't think you'd actually go through with it.
What's with that tone,\nafter making me do this?!
Enough with the jokes, you two.\nThis area is modeled after a village\nfrom the Ryukyu Kingdom era.
Hmm, wow. I didn't know they had a facility like this\nhere as well.
The fact that they built\na village of this scale inside a park is very impressive.\nIt's almost as we've stumbled upon an unknown village.
The houses here all look like ZEE Okinawan houses\nyou would see in movies and books.
Yes, the roofing design particularly stands out.
(...Strictly speaking, the way Yotsuba's pronouncing\n 'the' is wrong, but that's not really important\n right now. It's just something that's bugging me.)
Oh, that's a measure to protect against typhoons.\nThey apply plaster to the gaps in the red roof tiles\nto keep them from getting blown away by the wind.
It's said that the many stone walls and fences\naround Okinawan houses\nare also meant to protect against typhoons.
I see, so this is the aftermath of facing\nthe annual typhoons every year.
There's indeed a reason\nbehind the traditional townscape.
Yeah. Okinawa has abundant limestone deposits,\nwhich made it easy to create stone walls\nand stone-paved roads.
Come to think of it,\nI heard there's a street near Shurijo Castle\nthat still has the original stone paving from that time.
Is that so? I'm curious.\nI'm gonna look it up on my phone real quick.
Let's see... Near Shurijo Castle...
Oh, this is it!\nIt's apparently called the Kinjo Stone Road.
Look, the houses along the road have stone walls\nand red roof tiles too. This is really 'ZEE Okinawa!'
Well!\nWhat a gorgeous street.
Yes, it really gives off\nan old-fashioned Okinawan vibe.\nDo you want to go check it out?
Oh, wait a minute. According to people\nwho have been there%p-2;――
The slopes are very steep\nand it's difficult to climb.
...Uesugi-san, you gonna be alright?
I always have you, if things go south!
Of course! Leave it to me!
Even if you're exhausted and can't move, Uesugi-san,\nI'll carry you on my shoulders\nand take you up the hill!
Itsuki, take notes of these words of encouragement\nand overflowing smiles from Yotsuba!
...Aren't you embarrassed saying that?
By the way, Uesugi-san.
What's up?
Did you change our destination today\nbecause you came up with a strategy last night?
Well, that's the idea.
I can't imagine this...\nbeing a place of memories for you and Miku, though.
What do you mean?\nDo you think I'm going to be dinged up by a hill?
To be honest,\nthere's a possibility that you might.
W-well, if something happens, I'll carry you\nand make it to the summit without oxygen!
What snowy mountain are you planning on climbing?
(But it's embarrassing that I have to worry\n about my stamina even though I'm just sightseeing.\n I've gotta improve my fitness...)
By the way, Uesugi-san.
What's up?
Did you change our destination today\nbecause you came up with a strategy last night?
Well, that's the idea.
I can't imagine this...\nbeing a place of memories for you and Miku, though.
Miku might have a tough time.
(She's got little stamina.\n If it's tough for ordinary folk...)
Ho-ho.
I see, that's what you're worried about.
Huh?
You're worrying about Miku more than yourself!\nThat's what a boyfriend should do!
WHA?! No, this is different, you know?!
You don't have to be embarrassed.\nIt's natural for lovers to worry about each other.
Yes, this level of sweetness is acceptable.
By the way, Uesugi-san.
What's up?
Did you change our destination today\nbecause you came up with a strategy last night?
Well, that's the idea.
I can't imagine this...\nbeing a place of memories for you and Miku, though.
No doubt. Today is our first time coming here.
Then, why here?
I know you want to ask that,\nbut I'm sure this is the right time and place.
I see. You seem confident about it.
Alright, I won't ask any further.\nGood luck, Uesugi-kun.
Thanks.
